name: Lemon-Yogurt Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 small Lemons, grated zest and juiced
1 small Lemon, grated zest and juiced
recipeInstructions:
CAKE:
PREPARATION: Coat a 3-quart bundt or tube pan with 1 tablespoon of the butter and dust pan with 1 tablespoon of the flour.
Separate the eggs and set aside. Grate 2 teaspoons lemon zest and squeeze 1/3 cup lemon juice into a bowl. Beat remaining butter and sugar in a bowl until mixture is light and fluffy. Add egg yolks, one at a time, then lemon zest, lemon juice, and yogurt. Sift flour with baking powder, baking soda, and salt over the batter; mix just until incorporated.
Pour batter into prepared pan.
COOKING: Adjust oven rack to middle position and preheat oven to 350°F. Bake until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes. Cool cake in the pan for 10 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack to cool completely. Wrap and store at room temperature overnight or freeze for up to 1 month.
ASSEMBLY: Sift confectioners' sugar into a bowl; stir in lemon juice and yogurt until glaze is smooth. With cake on a wire rack over a pan to catch drippings, pour glaze over the cake, allowing it to drip down the sides. Let cake stand at room temperature until glaze sets, about 10 minutes.
Makes 12 servings.
[COOKS; Jan/Feb 1989]
